content.full_text:
California
Fair Political
Practices Commission

April 20, 1988

Patricia Anderson
City Clerk
1327 Foothill Blvd.
La Canada Flintridge, CA 91011

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. I-88-135

Dear Ms. Anderson:

You have requested information on the campaign disclosure
provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1/ Because you
are seeking general information, your request is considered to be
for informal assistance.2/

In a telephone conversation with you on April 8th, you told me
that many of the facts in your letter of March 31, 1988 had
changed. Therefore, this letter does not address the questions in
your letter. The purpose of this letter is to confirm the
*telephone advice I gave to you on April 8th.

A candidate for city council filed incorrect or incomplete
campaign disclosure statements for both preelection periods. I
advised you that the candidate is required to file statements for
both himself and for his controlled committee. He should file a
Form 490, which is a combined candidate and controlled committee
statement, for the first preelection period of January 1, 1988
through February 26, 1988. Also he is required to amend the Form
490 which he filed for the second preelection campaign statement
to cover the period February 27th through March 26th.

1/ Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory
references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated.
Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations
Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title
2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.

2/ Your letter states only a general question. Therefore, we
consider it to be a request for informal assistance pursuant to
Regulation 18329(c) (copy enclosed). Informal assistance does not
provide the requestor with the immunity provided by an opinion or
formal written advice. (Section 84113; Regulation 18329(c)(3).)

Patricia Anderson
Page 2


     I hope this information is helpful.  If you have additional
questions, please call me at (916) 322-5662.

                                        Sincerely,

                                        Diane M. Griffiths
                                        General Counsel

                                        [signature]

                                        By:  Bruce W. Robeck
                                             Political Reform Consultant

DMG:BWR:kmt

86-135

March 31,1988

APR 4 8 34 AM '88

[LOGO: LA CANADA FLINTRIDGE]

Mayor
J. Bixby Smith

Mayor Pro Tem
John W. Hastings

City Council
Joan C. Feehan
O. Warren Hillgren
Edmund J. Krause

City Manager
Donald H. Otterman

Mr. Bruce Robeck
Technical Assistance Division
Fair Political Practices Commission
Post Office Box 807
Sacramento, California
95804-0807

Dear Mr. Robeck:

I would like your assistance in providing informal advice on candidates'
filing responsibilities. One of the candidates for City Council in the City
of La Canada Flintridge submitted a Form 470 on March 29, 1988 to comply
with the March 31, 1988 candidate's filing deadline. However, the candidate
signed only his first name in the verification section. It is his
contention that the form is now invalid because the signature was not
complete. He also contends that because he was not notified of the
deficiency in the signature within 24 hours, he should be allowed to submit
a new form. My questions are: Is the form invalid. Should he be allowed
to submit a new form. Should the time schedule for filing campaign reports
be extended to allow him to submit a revised and/or corrected form.

I would appreciate your written advice on this matter. Thank you for your
cooperation.

Sincerely,

Patricia Anderson
City Clerk

cc City Attorney

1327 Foothill Boulevard
La Canada Flintridge
California 91011-2137
(818) 790-8860

CANDIDATE AND OFFICEHOLDER
CAMPAIGN STATEMENT — SHORT FORM

(Government Code Section 84206)

FORM 470
1988

For use by candidates and officeholders who do not have a controlled
committee* and who will not receive $1,000 or more in contributions and
will not spend $1,000 or more during the entire calendar year.

Type or Print in Ink

Period Covered: Calendar Year 19 88 .

RECEIVED

OFFICIAL USE ONLY

MAR 2 9 1988

CITY OF
LA CANADA FLINTRIDGE

NAME OF CANDIDATE OR OFFICEHOLDER:

CHRISTOPHER VALENTE

OFFICE SOUGHT OR HELD (INCLUDE LOCATION AND DISTRICT NUMBER IF APPLICABLE):

LA CANADA FLINTRIDGE CITY COUNCIL

RESIDENCE ADDRESS (STREET AND ZIP CODE)

4408 BERKSHIRE AVE. LA CANADA FLINTRIDGE 91011

BUSINESS ADDRESS (STREET AND ZIP CODE)

4449 CHEVY CHASE DR. LA CANADA FLINTRIDGE 91011

STATE

ZIP CODE

AREA CODE

PHONE NUMBER

STATE

ZIP CODE

AREA CODE

BUSINESS PHONE NUMBER

DATE OF ELECTION (MO., DAY, YR.) (IF APPLICABLE)

4/11/88

LIST ALL COMMITTEES OF WHICH YOU HAVE KNOWLEDGE WHICH ARE PRIMARILY FORMED TO RECEIVE CONTRIBUTIONS
OR MAKE EXPENDITURES ON BEHALF OF YOUR CANDIDACY

COMMITTEE NAME AND ID NUMBER

COMMITTEE ADDRESS

NAME OF TREASURER

COMMITTEE ELECT
CHRIS VALENTE.

880119

4442 ALTA CANYADA RD

RICHARD HARRIS

*Officeholders whose salary is less than $100 per month and judges, who have a controlled committee, may
use this form under certain circumstances. See the "Information Manual on Campaign Disclosure Provisions of
the Political Reform Act," for further information.

VERIFICATION

I declare under penalty of perjury that to the best of my knowledge, during the calendar year, less than $1,000
will be received and less than $1,000 will be expended by myself and that I have used all reasonable diligence in
preparing this statement.

I certify under penalty of perjury under the laws of the State of California that the foregoing is true and
correct.

Executed on 3/28/88 at LA CANADA FLINTRIDGE
(DATE) (CITY AND STATE)

by Christopher
(SIGNATURE OF CANDIDATE OR OFFICEHOLDER)

For information required to be provided to you pursuant to the Information Practices Act of 1977, see "Information Manual on Campaign
Disclosure Provisions of the Political Reform Act."

.

[La CANADA
FLINTRIDGE

March 30, 1988

Mayor
J. Bixby Smith

Mayor Pro Tem
John W. Hastings

City Council
Joan C. Feehan
O. Warren Hillgren
Edmund J. Krause

City Manager
Donald H. Otterman

Mr. Christopher Valente
404 Berkshire Avenue
La Canada Flintridge, California
91011

Dear Mr. Valente:

I am enclosing a Form 405 Amendment to Campaign Disclosure Statement. The
Form 470 you submitted on March 29, 1988 did not contain a complete
signature. Please execute the amended form and return it to this office as
soon as possible.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Sincerely,

Patricia Anderson
City Clerk

cc Fair Political Practices Commission
City Attorney

1327 Foothill Boulevard
La Canada Flintridge
California 91011-2137
(818) 790-8880

California
Fair Political
Practices Commission
April 8, 1988

Patricia Anderson
City Clerk
1327 Foothill Boulevard
La Canada Flintridge, CA  91011-2137

Re:  88-135

Dear Ms. Anderson:

Your letter requesting advice under the Political Reform
Act was received on April 4, 1988 by the Fair Political
Practices Commission.  If you have any questions about your
advice request, you may contact me directly at (916) 322-5662.

We try to answer all advice requests promptly.  Therefore,
unless your request poses particularly complex legal questions,
or more information is needed, you should expect a response
within 21 working days if your request seeks formal written
advice.  If more information is needed, the person assigned to
prepare a response to your request will contact you shortly to
advise you as to the information needed.  If your request is
for informal assistance, we will answer it as quickly as we
can.  (See Commission Regulation 18329 (2 Cal. Code of Regs.
Sec. 18329).)

You also should be aware that your letter and our response
are public records which may be disclosed to the public upon
receipt of a proper request for disclosure.

Very truly yours,

Jeanne Pritchard
Chief
Technical Assistance and Analysis
Division

428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 95804-0807 • (916) 322-5660
